Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

KC internet radio

Tech · asked by user [] · 2007-10-01 · 3 answers
What Krishna conscious radio do you listen over internet?[br]
[br]
I like these:[br]
[br]
RKC Live Stream (Radio Krishna Network - ITALY - RKC Terni - Live Stream New Music - TRANSCENDENTAL VIBRATIONS !)[br]
[url]http://www.radiokrishna.com:8080[/url][br]
[br]
KHQN - UtahKrishnas.Com Hare Krishna Internet Radio[br]
[url]http://www.radiokrishna.com:8010[/url][br]
[br]
Kirtan From The Hare Krishna Temple In Los Angeles [Broadband])[br]
[url]http://64.93.28.242:8010[/url][br]
[br]
Radio Chowpatty - Transcendental Kirtans & Bhajans sung at Sri Sri Radha Gopinath Mandir, Chowpatty, Mumbai, India[br]
[url]http://kara.fast-serv.com:9428/[/url][br]
[br]
Prabhupada - Bhajans (Hare Krishna Bhajan From The BBT In Los Angeles)[br]
[url]http://64.93.28.242:8000/[/url][br]
[br]
Any other tips?[br]
user [29] · 2007-11-09
Another list:[br]
[br]
[url]http://www.shoutcast.com/directory/?s=krishna[/url][br]
[br]
user [213] · 2007-11-10
http://chantandbehappy.com
user [29] · 2008-01-03
[br]
Ive just received this email originally from Jananivasa Prabhu[br]
[br]
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~quote~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[br]
[br]
Dear devotees,[br]
[br]
Please accept my respectful obeisances. All glories to Srila Prabhupada.[br]
[br]
Welcome to the new internet-radio station broadcasting around the clock![br]
[br]
[url]www.kirtanaradio.com[/url][br]
[br]
You can constantly hear your favorite bhajans and kirtans performed by His[br]
Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada, His Holiness Indradyumna[br]
Swami, His Holiness Bhakti Caru Swami, His Holiness Bhakti Bhringa Govinda[br]
Swami, His Holiness Niranjana Swami, His Holiness Sivarama Swami, His Grace[br]
Vayasaki Prabhu, His Grace Sri Prahlada Prabhu - as well as many other[br]
devotees chanting which makes your heart melting.[br]
[br]
You are welcome to offer your recordings and share the nectar of the Holy[br]
Names with others![br]
[br]
Best wishes in the new year,[br]
[br]
Your servant,[br]
[br]
Jananivasa das[br]
[br]
[br]
P.S. We are broadcasting with 128 kb per second stereo stream, so check up[br]
your internet traffic from time to time :-)[br]
[br]
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~quote~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[br]
[br]
